CONTENT.Career: Herzog made his professional debut for Hansa Rostock in the first round of the 2020–21 DFB-Pokal on 13 September 2020, coming on as a substitute in the 81st minute for Jan Löhmannsröben against Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart. The home match finished as a 1–0 loss.On 6 June 2023, Herzog signed with Alemannia Aachen in Regionalliga.On 26 January 2024, Herzog joined 3. Liga club VfB Lübeck on a 1.5-year deal.

SUMMARY: Aaron Philipp Herzog (born 30 January 1998) is a German professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for  club VfB Lübeck.
